title: Kuberaa
subTitle: Following a tycoon's discovery of a rare oil reserve, a compassionate beggar gets trapped in the dangerous mechanisms of his rapacious scheme.

title: Ab Ke Baras
subTitle: Anjali comes to India to investigate recurring visions of her past life in her dreams. Later, she meets a thief who might have been her lover in another lifetime.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Aisha
subTitle: Aisha, who enjoys playing Cupid despite her friend Arjun's disapproval, finds a new target, Shefali. However, her meddling ultimately damages her own relationships with close friends.

title: Badhaai Ho
subTitle: Nakul, a 25-year-old man, is shocked to discover that his mother is pregnant. His struggle to come to terms with the news puts his relationship with his girlfriend in jeopardy.

title: Kaabil
subTitle: Rohan, a visually impaired man, marries Supriya, the love of his life. Their happiness is tarnished when Supriya commits suicide after being raped by influential bandits.

title: Chhichhore
subTitle: A tragic incident forces Anirudh, a middle-aged man, to take a trip down memory lane and reminisce his college days along with his friends, who were labelled as losers.

title: Laxmii
subTitle: Asif's belief in logic and science is shattered when the ghost possesses him and supernatural forces begin to take over his house.

title: Taqdeer
subTitle: Soon after Avinash manages to get the phone number of his childhood love Priya, his phone gets stolen by a gangster. So, he sets out on a dangerous chase in order to reconcile with his lover.

title: The Warriorr
subTitle: Satya, a doctor, is brutally beaten and driven out of his city by Guru, a ruthless gangster. However, Satya returns two years later as a police officer to exact revenge on Guru.

title: Bhagavanth Kesari
subTitle: A former prisoner is adamant about training his adoptive daughter to join the Indian Army. However, his mission is interrupted by a conflict with a ruthless businessman.

title: Inspector Vijay
subTitle: Vijay, an honest police officer, meets Samyukta at a cafe and falls in love with her. However, his life changes when he witnesses a kidnapping and ends up helping a lonely woman, Lavanya.

title: Inspector Vijay
subTitle: Vijay, an honest police officer, meets Samyukta at a cafe and falls in love with her. However, his life changes when he witnesses a kidnapping and ends up helping a lonely woman, Lavanya.

title: Hungama 2
subTitle: Vani, Aakash's former lover, returns to him and reveals that he is the father of her child. However, things go awry when he rejects her claim and seeks help from his colleague Anjali.

title: Paras
subTitle: Paying a heavy price for choosing justice over crime, a brother-sister duo ends up separated. By the time they find each other again, plenty has changed in their lives.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: My Friend Ganesha 3
subTitle: Ganya, an orphan boy, inherits the property of his deceased family. However, his relatives trouble him for his assets, until Ganya is rescued by a special friend.

title: Mohabbatein
subTitle: A heartbroken music teacher helps three soul-stirring love stories thrive amid the turmoil of his decade-long conflict with a cold-hearted college principal.

title: Welcome
subTitle: Two thugs meet Rajiv, who belongs to a respectable family, and want to fix their sister's wedding with him. However, when Rajiv's uncle refuses to the match, a series of hilarious situations occur.

title: War 2
subTitle: Things get complicated when Kabir Dhaliwal, a secret agent, is accused of betraying his nation and his former batchmate shoulders the responsibility of finding him.

title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa
subTitle: Aditya Shrivastav, a psychologist, is called to investigate a palace haunted by a ghost. As he looks into the strange occurrences, he discovers the truth behind them.

title: Maa
subTitle: Circumstances bring a mother and a daughter to a village where girls have been mysteriously vanishing. The mother takes the form of goddess Kali to battle out the curse.

title: Darbar
subTitle: Aaditya, a high-ranking law enforcement official, sets out to eradicate the city's gangsters. As the events unfold, it becomes clear that his motivations are deeply personal.

title: Darbar
subTitle: Aaditya, a high-ranking law enforcement official, sets out to eradicate the city's gangsters. As the events unfold, it becomes clear that his motivations are deeply personal.

title: My Friend Ganesha
subTitle: A young boy feels unnoticed and lonely without his parents' attention. Things take a turn for the better when the maid suggests that the family bring home an idol of Lord Ganesha.

title: Dandupalya 2
subTitle: An investigative journalist, Abhivyakti, reinvestigates the case against the Dandupalya gang. After much toil, she manages to get in touch with the gang members to hear their side of the story.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Farz
subTitle: A veteran police officer becomes increasingly agitated when his partner is killed in the line of duty. To add to his woes, his daughter falls in love with his new daredevil partner.

title: Sanju
subTitle: Bollywood actor Sanjay Sanju Dutt slogs through the quagmire of personal turmoil, substance abuse, and legal battles to find his way to dizzying heights of success.

title: Kabhi Khushi Kabhie Gham ...
subTitle: Rahul, the adopted older son of a rich couple, is banished by his father when he chooses to marry a middle-class woman. Years later, his younger brother, Rohan, sets out to find him.

title: Maa
subTitle: Circumstances bring a mother and a daughter to a village where girls have been mysteriously vanishing. The mother takes the form of goddess Kali to battle out the curse.

title: Stree 2: Sarkate Ka Aatank
subTitle: When Sarkata, a headless spirit, starts snatching the women of Chanderi away into a petrifying parallel realm, Vicky and his friends must save the day.

title: Mardaani 2
subTitle: A twenty-one-year-old psychopath has an affinity towards raping and murdering young woman. But, a cop, Shivani Shivaji Roy, is on his heels as she tries to bring him to justice.

title: Dangal
subTitle: Mahavir Singh Phogat, a former wrestling champion, dedicates himself to transforming his daughters, Geeta and Babita, into elite wrestlers.

title: Hulchul
subTitle: A man and a woman come from two feuding families and pretend to be in love for revenge. Their plan goes awry when they fall in love and they must work on bringing together their families.
